verified.name: Agile Robots
verified.description: Founded in 2018 by robotics researchers from the German Aerospace Center, Agile Robots develops AI-driven robotics and automation solutions for automotive, consumer electronics, healthcare and service industries.
verified.notes: Source [0] mentions 'a passionate team of robotics researchers from the German Aerospace Center' but does not explicitly name individual founders. Current_stage, total_raised, valuation, and specific investor names cannot be verified from source [0] alone.

changesProposed.name: AlixLabs

current.name: AlixLabs
current.founder: Jonas Sundqvist, Dmitry Suyatin, Amin Karimi

verified.name: AlixLabs
verified.description: Swedish semiconductor equipment supplier using Atomic Layer Etching (ALE) process technology to manufacture nanostructures with characteristic sizes smaller than 20 nanometers, enabling fabrication beyond the resolution limits of optical and electron beam lithography.
verified.notes: Series A funding closed in April 2026 with €15M total (€14.1M announced November 2025, additional €0.9M from Stephen Industries in April 2026). Company was spun off from Lund University. Amin Karimi listed as Co-Founder but joined in 2021, not 2019 founding.

changesProposed.name: Applied Intuition

verified.name: Applied Intuition
verified.description: Develops software platforms and simulation tools for physical AI, providing autonomy stacks for road vehicles, industrial machines, and defense systems. Works with 18 of the 20 largest global OEMs, autonomy startups, and defense companies.
verified.notes: Series F funding ($600M) and valuation ($15B) announced June 2025 per Wikipedia source. Previous valuation was $6B in 2024. Founded January 2017. Marc Andreessen joined as board member in 2017.

changesProposed.name: Baykar

verified.name: Baykar
verified.description: Turkish defense company specializing in unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and combat drones including the TB2, TB3, Akıncı, and Kızılelma models, with operations in 37 export countries.
verified.notes: Wikipedia lists founding year as 1984, while company website states 1986 in 'Baykar in Numbers' section. Wikipedia is more detailed and consistent. Özdemir Bayraktar (founder) died October 18, 2021. Company acquired Piaggio Aerospace on December 27, 2024. Leonardo and Baykar agreed to cooperate on UAVs on March 6, 2025. Database entry claims $1.8B 2024 exports and ~$10B valuation but these are not verifiable from provided sources.

changesProposed.name: Electra

verified.notes: The sources provided describe Electra as a 120V induction stove manufacturer (sources 0-1), not the iron ore refining company described in the database entry. Source 2 is about Greek mythology and irrelevant. The database entry describes a completely different company (steel/iron ore processing via electrochemistry). No verified information about founders, founding year, funding, stage, or valuation could be found in these sources for either company.
